Who made this?

Brain Cannesdy is a labor of love from the team at Fantasy Brands — a searchable archive of Cannes Lions award-winning work, built so creatives, strategists, and the endlessly curious can study the best ideas in advertising all in one place.

We built it because the world's most inspiring campaigns deserve to be easy to find, watch, and learn from — not scattered across a dozen sites and award-show archives. If it sparks an idea, we did our job.

We're always building. Follow along for more.
